programme.desc: The family goes on holiday in a van that turns into a house at the push of a button

programme.title: Milkshake! Bop Box Boogie
programme.desc: Specially composed and choreographed songs involving lots of jumping, with the presenters teaching the audience the moves and then encouraging them to dance along with them

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Jonathan and Paddington dig up some broken pottery that turns out to be a statue made by Mrs Brown. But who broke it?

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Animated action adventure following a squad of six heroic puppies and their tech-savvy 10-year-old leader as they protect the community of Adventure Bay

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: Scootio's tablet computer stops working, so Ricky, Loop, and DJ ride to the top of Windshield Point to help her

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: Animation about the adventures of two young pirates and their crew. Pirata finds a piece of carved wood, which looks like a fragment from a very old pirate ship

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey's Amazing Adventures
programme.desc: The character uses his imagination to find out how the Romans lived and, with the help of archaeologist Rob as the Milkshakers make their own Roman buildings

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The gang go bowling, but Big Boo accidentally sticks one of the skittles to the ground

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High court enforcement officers Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner evict a couple who owe five months' rent on a flat in an affluent suburb of London, and later hit a snag when they try to seize a taxi over a £3,000 debt. In Bristol, county court bailiff Steve Wood finds out that unpaid rent is not the only problem when he attempts to repossess a corner shop

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. Eviction specialists also come to the aid of Amit, who found himself continuing his late father's battle with a nightmare renter, and 70-year-old landlady Joan, who started receiving unnerving threats from her rent-skipping tenant after she started legal proceedings to get him evicted

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Colby turns the screws on Dean, Amber comes clean about what is really driving her own search, and Willow brings in her old crew in to help ditch the van

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi apologises to Shane and he is glad to reconnect, but things with Dipi are not so simple. It is party season, and Roxy decides to loosen things up between Levi and Bea

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine the experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. Posters aimed at naming and shaming one of the residents of Withycombe, Somerset, for taking part in a government-backed badger cull result in him and his family being driven out by animal rights activists. In Woodford Green, north-east London, an ambitious house extension results in all light being blocked to one neighbouring property and huge cracks appearing in the other, while a Bournemouth woman ends up having a restraining order taken out against her after erecting a gated driveway before receiving official approval

programme.title: Killer Mother: Switched at Birth (2020)
programme.desc: A woman's family is thrown into crisis when she discovers that her child is not her biological daughter as she had believed. It turns out that Hailey was switched at birth with Brooke's biological daughter, Breanne, currently being raised by her mother, Alexis

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi apologises to Shane and he is glad to reconnect, but things with Dipi are not so simple. It is party season, and Roxy decides to loosen things up between Levi and Bea

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Colby turns the screws on Dean, Amber comes clean about what is really driving her own search, and Willow brings in her old crew in to help ditch the van

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: How to Lose a Stone in a Month
programme.desc: Ruth Langsford investigates diets, inviting 12 people to test some of the world's most extreme weight-loss programmes under the supervision of GP Dr Amir Khan. Those taking part include fun-loving Jen, whose wedding and two hen parties are coming up, and teaching assistant Alicia, who eats takeaways four nights a week and is morbidly obese

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall checks up on a 13 stone Newfoundland, whose health is in danger due to his weight - but who refuses to exercise unless he has been bribed with treats. Other pets on his list are a Great Dane with a social media following who makes his owners' lives unbearable and a dog so spoiled she even has her own car, but who has a serious dislike of children

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben meets a Pembrokeshire family living on the side of a rugged mountain, where they catch and forage for their own food and salvage junk for homemade inventions. Ben helps them put their latest creations to the test in all weathers, and learns about the special global policy for utopian living that they have signed up to

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack
programme.desc: Programme exploring the rising number of assaults on police officers, revealing what they face in the line of duty, and the emotional toll these incidents take. A late-night patrol pulls over a man suspected of driving under the influence, but they soon find themselves dealing with much more. Meanwhile, officers respond to an emergency call by residents on an estate, but the atmosphere takes a worrying turn when the residents turn on the officers

programme.title: Road House (1989)
programme.desc: A philosophy-reading kung fu expert gains a reputation as the best bouncer around, and is hired by the owner of a rowdy Missouri bar to keep the peace. When he fires some of the establishment's corrupt staff, he incurs the wrath of a local crime boss who has a stranglehold on the town's businesses. Action thriller, starring Patrick Swayze, Ben Gazzara, Kelly Lynch, Sam Elliott and blues singer Jeff Healey

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Latest update from the world of showbusiness

programme.title: Road House (1989)
programme.desc: A philosophy-reading kung fu expert gains a reputation as the best bouncer around, and is hired by the owner of a rowdy Missouri bar to keep the peace. When he fires some of the establishment's corrupt staff, he incurs the wrath of a local crime boss who has a stranglehold on the town's businesses. Action thriller, starring Patrick Swayze, Ben Gazzara, Kelly Lynch, Sam Elliott and blues singer Jeff Healey

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom

programme.title: Tribal Teens - Here Comes Trouble
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old nightclub dancer Courtney and 17-year-old ultra-vain Charlie face up to life on the frozen Mongolian plains as they spend a week with a family of hardy Kazakhs in a communal tent. The pair consume the local cuisine - including horse meat - and contend with only the most basic sanitation. They also learn to appreciate that for the Kazakh tribe, even getting water involves a major expedition to a frozen river to hack out blocks of ice

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and the team suggest ways in which changes to homes could positively affect the personal lives of their owners

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Estate agent Ann Maurice offers her expertise to a couple whose home in Rothwell near Leeds is still for sale after 10 months, despite having attracted more than 30 viewings. Her advice includes ridding the house of the all-pervading pet smell, replacing the threadbare stair carpet and adding a lick of paint in a bid to persuade the next viewer to make an offer

programme.title: Teen Wolf (1985)
programme.desc: A teenage misfit is initially dismayed to learn he is a werewolf as a result of a hereditary curse. He finds there are advantages as he becomes a local celebrity, while his enhanced agility makes him the star player of his school's basketball team - but fame quickly goes to his head. Comedy, starring Michael J Fox, James Hampton and Susan Ursitti

programme.title: Rango (2011)
programme.desc: A pet chameleon with an active imagination ends up lost in the desert. He makes his way to a lawless town of animals, where he is mistaken for a deadly gunslinger and made sheriff. He organises the townsfolk into a posse when bandits led by an evil rattlesnake steal their supply of water. Oscar-winning animated comedy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Isla Fisher and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson

programme.title: Flight of the Navigator (1986)
programme.desc: A boy mysteriously disappears in 1978, and is found eight years later, having not aged a day. He escapes being experimented on by government scientists by taking off in a crashed alien spaceship. With the help of the robot pilot, he tries to find out what has happened to him and if he can get back home. Sci-fi adventure, starring Joey Cramer and Veronica Cartwright, with the voice of Paul Reubens

programme.title: Zathura: A Space Adventure (2005)
programme.desc: Two squabbling brothers with time on their hands decide to play a mysterious old board game after finding it in their basement. A chance roll of the dice sends their house into deep space, where they must battle with aliens and work together to stay alive. Family sci-fi adventure, starring Josh Hutcherson, Jonah Bobo, Kristen Stewart, Tim Robbins and Dax Shepard

programme.title: Why Him? (2016)
programme.desc: A protective dad is far from thrilled when his daughter begins dating a foul-mouthed playboy millionaire, who has made his fortune with the kind of technology that is driving their own old-fashioned printing company out of business. A holiday gathering threatens to go off the rails when he realises the object of her affections is about to pop the question. Comedy, starring Bryan Cranston, James Franco and Zoey Deutch

programme.title: The Hatton Garden Job (2017)
programme.desc: A ragtag group of career criminals plot an audacious, multi-million-pound raid on an underground facility in London. True-life crime drama, with Stephen Moyer, Larry Lamb and Matthew Goode

programme.title: Embrace of the Serpent (2015)
programme.desc: An Amazonian shaman befriends two scientists at different points in his life, each in search of the same rare plant. Drama, starring Nilbio Torres and Antonio Bolivar. In Spanish, Portuguese, Aboriginal, German, Catalan and Latin

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: The key breakthroughs of Deaf people's battle against oppression

programme.title: The Professionals (1966)
programme.desc: A wealthy Texan hires four mercenaries to rescue his wife, who has been abducted and taken to Mexico by a bandit gang. However, when they find her, she refuses to leave and they have to take her by force - ending in a cross-border chase with the outlaws on their trail. Western adventure, with Burt Lancaster, Lee Marvin, Robert Ryan, Woody Strode, Jack Palance and Claudia Cardinale

programme.title: Carry On Sergeant (1958)
programme.desc: A military sergeant approaching retirement hopes to end his career on a high note by seeing his last lot of recruits come first in an annual competition to find the best squad in the forces. However, he is not prepared for the hopeless band of misfits placed under his command. The first in the comedy series, starring William Hartnell and Bob Monkhouse

programme.title: Mary, Queen of Scots (1971)
programme.desc: Historical biopic about the life and loves of the ill-fated 16th-century monarch, whose opposition to her cousin Elizabeth I led to her downfall and execution. Starring Vanessa Redgrave, Glenda Jackson, Timothy Dalton, Patrick McGoohan, Nigel Davenport and Ian Holm

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers' home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Forrest Gump (1994)
programme.desc: A slow-witted man has a series of bizarre adventures, including becoming an American football star, Vietnam veteran, table tennis champion and millionaire businessman - but the love of his life from childhood continues to elude him. Robert Zemeckis's Oscar-winning comedy drama, starring Tom Hanks, Sally Field, Robin Wright and Gary Sinise

programme.title: Another Year (2010)
programme.desc: Tom and Gerri are approaching retirement, and have maintained a happy and successful marriage. Over the course of a year, they are visited by various family and friends who are less content - particularly a single, heavy-drinking friend of Gerri's whose dissatisfaction gradually gets out of control. Mike Leigh's comedy drama, starring Lesley Manville, Jim Broadbent and Ruth Sheen

programme.title: Little Men (2016)
programme.desc: A 13-year-old boy recovering from the death of his grandfather befriends the son of a Chilean woman, who rents a dress shop from his parents. When the rent on the shop is increased, it creates a bitter feud between the two families, and the boys respond by taking a vow of silence to pressure their parents into backing down. Drama, starring Greg Kinnear and Jennifer Ehle

programme.title: How Green Was My Valley (1941)
programme.desc: Residents of a Welsh mining community at the start of the 20th century struggle to come to terms with the decline in their traditional way of life. Oscar-winning drama, starring Walter Pidgeon, Maureen O'Hara, Donald Crisp and Roddy McDowall

programme.title: Carry On Teacher (1959)
programme.desc: A headmaster hopes to land a more prestigious job at a better school, but his pupils do not want him to leave. When two inspectors pay a visit, the mischievous students see a chance to sabotage his career plans with a series of pranks. Comedy, starring Ted Ray, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: The Man from Colorado (1948)
programme.desc: An American Civil War veteran, twisted by his experiences during the conflict, becomes the judge of a small town. He embarks on a reign of terror, ruthlessly misusing his power, and it falls to an old friend from his army days to bring him down. Western, starring Glenn Ford, William Holden, Ellen Drew and Ray Collins

programme.title: Captain Scarlett (1953)
programme.desc: A brave nobleman forms a band of outlaws to free 19th-century French villagers from the tyranny of an evil duke, reclaim his birthright and save a lovely princess from a fate worse than death at the hands of a lecherous count. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Richard Greene, Leonora Amar, Nedrick Young and Manolo Fabregas

programme.title: Cutthroat Island (1995)
programme.desc: A tough female pirate enlists the help of an educated slave in finding the three parts of a map leading to buried treasure. However, one of the pieces is in the hands of her cruel uncle, and she also has to find the loot before her crew mutinies or the British Navy catches up with her. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Geena Davis, Matthew Modine, Frank Langella and Maury Chaykin

programme.title: Logan (2017)
programme.desc: In the near future, Wolverine cares for an ailing Professor X somewhere on the Mexican border. However, the razor-clawed hero's attempts to hide from the world are turned upside down when a young mutant arrives, pursued by cyborg bounty hunters in the employ of a sinister corporation. Fantasy adventure, starring Hugh Jackman, Patrick Stewart, Dafne Keen and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Criminal (2016)
programme.desc: A deceased CIA agent's secrets, skills and memories are implanted into a death-row inmate in the hope that he will complete an operative's crucial mission. Thriller, starring Kevin Costner, Ryan Reynolds, Gary Oldman and Gal Gadot

programme.title: Pride and Prejudice and Zombies (2016)
programme.desc: Regency England is overrun by hordes of zombies following an outbreak of the Black Death. Five sisters put their talent for martial arts to good use fighting the ravenous hordes of the walking dead, while also contending with the equally daunting challenge of finding suitable husbands. Comedy adventure based on Seth Grahame-Smith's novel, starring Lily James, Sam Riley, Matt Smith and Charles Dance

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back groom-to-be Leon plans a wedding on Weymouth beach, but his future bride Kirsty dreams of a romantic fairy-tale day at a venue that means something special to her

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A germophobe wife who tries to run her house like a corporation swaps lives with the mother of a messy, cat-filled household

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon makes friends with an upper-class senior pupil who introduces him to a new field of science. Meanwhile, Mary and George disagree on how to handle Sheldon's blossoming social life

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: A disappointing lack of success in a competition at the school science fair sends Sheldon's life in a new direction as he rejects the idea of becoming a scientist in favour of acting. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Sheldon is bullied by an unlikely character, Mary and George disagree on how to handle the situation, contemplating whether they should their son employ self-defence techniques. Undeterred, he tries his hand at jiu-jitsu and even covers himself in bubble-wrap for protection

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Mary bans Sheldon from reading a comic book that she considers to be too mature for him, the youngster decides it's time to stop living under his mother's thumb

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The prodigy dismantles the refrigerator to stop it making an annoying humming noise and is then forced to get a paper round to pay for the repairs to the damaged appliance. Comedy spin-off prequel to The Big Bang Theory, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Meemaw intervenes when Sheldon gets jealous of Dr Sturgis bonding with Paige, a rival 10-year-old genius. In the meantime, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tries to help Sheldon when he starts to wonder whether he is wasting his time studying string theory. Meanwhile, during a dinner, Raj discovers Howard once embarrassed himself on a date with Emily. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard try to distract Sheldon from his career woes by reinstating Anything Can Happen Thursday, but it causes friction among the gang when Amy and Bernadette are caught lying. Meanwhile, Raj seeks Howard's help in preparing for a date with Emily. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang's preparations for Star Wars Day are interrupted by the news that Professor Proton has died. Leonard and Penny attend the funeral, where they talk about their rejected marriage proposals, but Sheldon has difficulty dealing with the death of his childhood hero - until a surprise visitor helps him cope with his grief. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with a guest appearance by Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets fired from the movie, prompting her to take a serious look at her life. Raj receives advice from Sheldon after he sees Emily on a date with another man at the cinema, while Howard's mother breaks her leg. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes upset about his career, the destruction of the comic-book store and Leonard and Penny's future living arrangements. Elsewhere, Howard is unable to keep hold of a carer for his mother. Comedy, staring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Amy are forced to take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon after his epic railway journey ends in chaos. Meanwhile, Howard finds Stuart's relationship with his mother strange, and Penny has an interview for a sales job at Bernadette's workplace. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to teach a course at the university, and Howard surprises the gang when he decides to enrol on it. Meanwhile, Amy plays Penny and Bernadette off against each other while the tension brews over Penny's new job. Comedy, guest starring Regina King (Southland), with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade guides husband and wife Spencer Matthews and Vogue Williams, Olympic cycling gold medallist Chris Hoy, reality TV star Jessica Wright and the Rev Richard Coles through the four zones of the Maze, tackling a range of skill, mystery, physical and mental challenges

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The best bits of Junior Bake Off 2019, hosted by Harry Hill. Prue Leith and Liam Charles put the second batch of 10 junior bakers through their paces as they tackle cakes, biscuits, bread, desserts and pastry

programme.title: The Fault in Our Stars (2014)
programme.desc: Indianapolis teenager Hazel has terminal thyroid cancer and attends a patients' support group, where she meets fellow teen Gus, who lost a leg to the disease. The two fall in love and a shared passion for books leads them on a literary pilgrimage to Amsterdam in search of reclusive author Peter van Houten. Romantic drama based on the bestselling novel by John Green, starring Shailene Woodley, Ansel Elgort, Laura Dern and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit (2014)
programme.desc: A former soldier injured in the line of duty takes up a new career as a financial analyst for the CIA. However, his deskbound position changes to a dangerous undercover assignment when he discovers a plot to destroy the US economy. Spy thriller inspired by Tom Clancy's series of novels, starring Chris Pine, Keira Knightley, Kevin Costner and Kenneth Branagh, who also directed

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Film actor John Hannah, Channel 4 News anchor Krishnan Guru-Murthy, actress Nicola Coughlan, television and radio presenter Rylan Clark-Neal and renowned dancer-now-Strictly head judge Shirley Ballas complete a series of tasks in the hard-fought, high-stakes, ridiculous game show. Assistant Alex Horne helps coax the contestants, but it's Taskmaster Greg Davies who determines the victor

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes 45-year-old twice-divorced Nicola, who is hoping one of the six naked men behind the screens has what it takes to be husband number three. The second of this episode's contestants is Mark from London, who has Crohn's disease and hopes to regain some body confidence on the show

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the Eurovision Song Contest, the Queen's 90th Birthday Celebration, Countdown, The Hollow Crown, Let's Do It: A Tribute to Victoria Wood, 24 Hours in A&E and the News. First shown in May 2016

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The households share their critiques of Britain's Got Talent, Peaky Blinders, The Great British Sewing Bee, Storm Troupers: The Fight to Forecast the Weather, Secret Life of the Human Pups, Big Fish Man, and the News. First shown in May 2016

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny attempt to prove Sheldon wrong when he claims that he and Amy have a superior relationship. Meanwhile, Howard is nervous when Nasa asks him to throw the first pitch at a baseball game honouring National Space Day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's girlfriend Emily (Laura Spencer) gives Penny the cold shoulder when she learns about his past. Meanwhile, the guys debate investing in Stuart's comic-book shop and becoming part owners of the business. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: In an hour long special, Mandy and Nancy help Tom decorate The Dog for the wedding. Meanwhile, the villagers frantically search for Charlie and Ella before Victor can find them

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: John Paul is fearful when he speaks to George about the dangerous situation unfolding in the village. Elsewhere, Ollie's actions threaten to tear Cindy and Luke apart

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin wins James's ring during a pre-wedding game of poker and refuses to give it back, and Lily coaches Barney on how to handle the emotional stress when he is forced to choose between his bride-to-be and his mother Loretta (Frances Conroy). Meanwhile, Ted and Marshall argue over wedding gifts and whether thank-you cards were sent in the past. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps working parents Jessica and CJ Braido, who feel they are being overrun by their four small children, and struggle to agree on what parenting methods to adopt

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in Ukraine for his fiancee Anna, hoping to impress his bride-to-be and her mother. Will Andy's big wedding abroad be a hit with Anna, or will it all get lost in translation?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is not pleased when his assistant Alex starts flirting with Leonard and has a word with her about it. Unfortunately, his comments are so inappropriate that he is accused of sexual harassment and sent to the university's human resources department, where he ends up dragging Leonard, Raj and Howard into trouble too. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake badly injures himself while chasing down a suspect, but then refuses to take time off from work to recover. Holt and Rosa have an awkward dinner date with their significant others, so they invite Amy and Gina along as well. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is excited to work a case with the best detective in the NYPD, Dave Majors - until his colleague shares his intentions to ask Amy out on a date. Rosa's surprising fashion choice causes a stir, and Charles and Gina make an unexpected discovery. Comedy, with Andy Samberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj does not want Howard to join him in hosting a show at the planetarium. Sheldon goes to great lengths to ensure Amy is free to help him work on a project

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon seeks revenge on Howard when his colleague dresses up as him for Halloween. Leonard is shocked that Penny does not remember their first kiss

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Dr Cox has to mobilise everyone when three patients require transplants, leaving the doctors struggling to find donors. Meanwhile, JD learns a lesson about responsibility, and Elliot and Carla confront Todd about his inappropriate behaviour. Comedy, starring Zach Braff

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Dr Cox turns to drink after his mistakes result in the deaths of three patients, so the other members of staff try to convince him how much he inspires them. Meanwhile, JD helps Turk find ways to bond with his new supervisor

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder is upset when he discovers his friends have deleted him from their profiles on social media websites, and Lennox is determined to beat Zander's test scores. Meanwhile, Joe begins to date Mel's high-maintenance friend Anita (Shannon Elizabeth). Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel desperately tries to act like a cool aunt after discovering that Lennox and Zander have taken their relationship to the next level, but Joe just wants to kill the boyfriend. Meanwhile, Ryder's girlfriend Keira is impressed by his undeserved bad boy reputation, but her parents are not. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake thinks Boyle might have met his soulmate in Genevieve, an art gallery owner, and tries to set the pair up on a date. Meanwhile, Rosa deals with an intra-precinct theft and Amy seeks Holt's help with an image campaign. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a serial killer, Peralta enlists Holt's help in an attempt to solve the case without the new captain finding out. Diaz and Santiago are forced to deal with the murderer's demands, while Jeffords discovers a new obsession. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Dean Winters, with Andy Samberg

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Following a tragic accident in the local community, Mary's faith is shaken. Seeing his mother doubt everything she believes, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Zoe Perry

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Sheldon's father asks him to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives him to Tam's for his first sleepover. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes jealous when Amy gets attention in the media, Raj spots Anu talking to her ex-boyfriend, and Stuart is intimidated by the idea of moving in with Denise, all of which cause mayhem when Penny and Leonard organise a paintball game

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's former boyfriend Zack and his wife encounter fertility problems when wanting a baby, so ask Leonard for his help. Raj attempts to patch things up with his estranged fiancee Anu

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes plans to unearth the mole in her family. Meanwhile, Celeste can see how happy Toby is as he prepares for his date with Cleo

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: A fresh group of people embarks on the social experiment, beginning by celebrating their final night of single life in style with the ultimate stag and hen parties

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Presenters Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig welcome comedians Joe Lycett and Lee Mack, writer and actor Griff Rhys Jones, and TV presenter Melanie Sykes to the famous tent. The celebrities face three tricky tests set by judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood - beginning with a blondies signature challenge, then a testing technical and concluding with the opportunity to reveal their secret passions with their cake showstopper. Which of the famous faces will impress those judges?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is forced to revise for a work assessment during the girls' trip to Las Vegas, and Amy and Bernadette accuse her of spoiling their fun. Meanwhile, the guys try to invent something of scientific importance - but only come up with new ways to procrastinate. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny ask Howard and Bernadette for advice when they argue about money. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj try to find out whether they could survive a dark matter research expedition in a salt mine by attempting to simulate the conditions in a steam tunnel beneath the university. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The households share their critiques of Britain's Got Talent, Top Gear, Versailles, 70 with a Six Pack, Countryfile, 24 Hours in Police Custody, How to Get a Council House and the News from the comfort of their own homes. First shown in June 2016

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies invites all five contestants to have some global fun with a beach ball, while Lou Sanders has some wise words for the youth of today. Plus, Paul Sinha tries to invent a revolutionary new use for a basketball, and Sian Gibson attempts to rescue Little Alex Horne from the sharp beak of an aquatic bird

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Fred and his team of matchmakers welcome electrician Eddie, who turns into a sweaty wreck when he talks to women, as well as 81-year-old retired reflexologist Sheila, who is determined to find love. Bank analyst Poppy, 23, worries that she'll never find a man who can see past her wheelchair, while advertising director Tom, 27, is a ball of energy who leaves all of his ex-boyfriends in the slow lane

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Cordelia has a vision revealing a connection between the Beast and Angel's evil self, Angelus. To find out more about their new enemy, Wesley enlists the aid of a powerful mystic to remove the vampire's soul, bringing his villainous alter ego back to life. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney is upset when he discovers Ted still has feelings for Robin, and works through his anger at a poker night. Marshall hasn't made it back to New York yet, but manages to help settle their dispute via a video call. Meanwhile, Lily realises she is Robin's only female friend and begins to worry she could be lonely while she's in Rome for a year, so sets about attempting to find her a replacement buddy. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin wins James's ring during a pre-wedding game of poker and refuses to give it back, and Lily coaches Barney on how to handle the emotional stress when he is forced to choose between his bride-to-be and his mother Loretta (Frances Conroy). Meanwhile, Ted and Marshall argue over wedding gifts and whether thank-you cards were sent in the past. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: John Paul is fearful when he speaks to George about the dangerous situation unfolding in the village. Elsewhere, Ollie's actions threaten to tear Cindy and Luke apart

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes is more convinced than ever that Silas is the McQueens' tormentor. Meanwhile, Darren, Nancy and Mandy struggle to come to terms with the events of New Year's Eve

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted realises he could take any one of three women to the wedding, but chooses poorly over which to spend time with. Barney and Robin steal Marshall and Lily's story on how they first met after feeling judged about their messy past by the stern minister who is marrying them. Meanwhile, Marshall finds out more about his driving companion Daphne on their long journey. American sitcom, starring Josh Radon and Alyson Hannifin

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Daphne reveals the truth about Marshall becoming a judge in a text message to Lily, so he begs Ted to try to delete the notification while Lily is sleeping using the gang's 'no questions asked' rule. However, Barney and Robin also attempt to help Ted, but realise they are both acting on their own initiative without consulting each other. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Ben Corry is away for months at a time with the army, leaving stay-at-home mum Maria to discipline their four rowdy daughters. Jo Frost brings this military family into line

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: A fresh group of people embarks on the social experiment, beginning by celebrating their final night of single life in style with the ultimate stag and hen parties

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt begins to worry he is being set up for a fall by one of his superiors, and Peralta is handed the chance to work on an important case. Meanwhile, Jeffords tries to make sure his twins get a place at their chosen school. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Terry Crews

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago go undercover as an engaged couple in a bid to catch an identity thief, and find that the investigation brings them closer together. Meanwhile, Boyle organises a surprise birthday party for Rosa. Comedy, with Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is caught between a rock and a hard place when he is made responsible for distributing extra grant money. Bernadette turns the back garden playhouse into a hideaway to escape from her husband and children

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to befriend Amy's father, but when Howard lures Mr Fowler away with his magic tricks Sheldon has no choice but to bond with Mrs Fowler. Meanwhile, Raj and Anu attempt to get physical. Kathy Bates and Teller guest star

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD feels the same things keep happening in the hospital, and Dr Cox returns to work, but Elliot fears he is not his usual confident self. Meanwhile, Carla grows resentful that Turk can still do things she cannot because of her pregnancy

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD challenges a urologist's assessment, but later becomes attracted to her. Elliot considers breaking up with Keith, and the Janitor has an argument with Dr Kelso about fear. Comedy, starring Zach Braff, with Elizabeth Banks (Zack and Miri)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel tries to gain votes by co-hosting a local TV show with Joe, and their on-camera bickering makes them an instant hit. But their popularity begins to have an effect on Lennox and Ryder, so they must decide on whether fame or family is more important. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel's new boyfriend Noah temporarily moves in to her apartment while his is being renovated, and Lennox starts a dream internship at a local newspaper - but struggles to wake up in time for work

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win the Halloween heist contest. Each side attempts to steal the same item, a fancy-dress crown locked in a briefcase in the interrogation room in order to claim the title of 'amazing detective or genius'

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Charles take Terry on a camping trip to help him deal with stress. Amy gets Gina to help her persuade the police department to buy a product she invented as a child. Holt helps Rosa to break up with Marcus. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins. but Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Mary clashes with Sheldon's drama teacher over plans for a Halloween fundraiser for the church. Georgie falls for a rebellious teenage girl that Sheldon is tutoring

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy are thrilled when their super-asymmetry theory is proved correct by two physicists from Chicago - until the experts try to exclude Amy from their Nobel Prize nomination. Bernadette experiences a big success at work and plans for Penny to become a part of it - whether she wants to or not

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is excited to help Howard and Bernadette navigate some bureaucratic paperwork, until he discovers that they are breaking the law, leaving him with a difficult choice between following the rules or staying loyal to his friends. Leonard is disappointed when he is excluded from a scientific project his friends are working on

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Silas has one more game left to play with the McQueens, leaving Mercedes panicked when Sylver returns from the airport without Bobby

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: A bride's wedding turns to disaster when she oversleeps on her big day, and a big-hearted guy meets the girl of his dreams, only to have his perfect day ruined by his best man

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Comedy set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland. The start of a new school term gets off to a bad start for Erin when she wakes to find her cousin reading her diary. But there is worse to come when Granda Joe announces a bomb has been found on the bridge. Saoirse-Monica Jackson stars

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The girls have been up all night revising for a big exam - and all of them are convinced they are going to fail. So when an opportunity to get out of the test presents itself, they jump at the chance - especially as it involves spending time with Father Peter, who everyone fancies. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson and Jamie-Lee O'Donnell

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is left in a difficult professional situation when a doctor (guest star Billy Bob Thornton) turns up at her door following her flirtatious sales technique, so the guys try to help her out. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette have a dispute over whether female scientists should flaunt their sexuality to try to get ahead at work. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang re-creates a prom night on the roof of the apartment building when the girls decide they would like to re-enact their evenings with their current partners. However, Sheldon feels under pressure to take part in all the romantic traditions, and Howard worries about who Stuart will bring as his date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their critiques of Versailles, Genius by Stephen Hawking, Eating Well with Hemsley + Hemsley, Cameron and Farage Live, Inside Birmingham Children's Hospital, The Jungle Book and the news

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne takes scrupulous notes as Paul Sinha squats in a telephone box, and Iain Stirling stakes his claim for the Scottish national football team

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Blonde bombshell Bella, who has a penchant for dressing up as characters from the musical Cats, has a date with well-to-do Tom, whose dad is a Sir and his mum a Lady. Basement Jaxx singer Sharlene is used to taking centre stage with her hit band, but she hasn't found a man to share the spotlight with her, while 27-year-old Derby lass Rachel is a single mum of two with little time for herself

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: With Angel's soul removed and safely stored away, the gang is able to interrogate the resurrected Angelus for information about the Beast, but his mind games turn them against each other. Directed by Sean Astin, most famous for his role as Samwise Gamgee in the Lord of the Rings movies

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny puts the motel in an awkward position after renting rooms to a morally dubious enterprise, while David helps Moira to record a film audition

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted realises he could take any one of three women to the wedding, but chooses poorly over which to spend time with. Barney and Robin steal Marshall and Lily's story on how they first met after feeling judged about their messy past by the stern minister who is marrying them. Meanwhile, Marshall finds out more about his driving companion Daphne on their long journey. American sitcom, starring Josh Radon and Alyson Hannifin

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

However, Barney and Robin also attempt to help Ted, but realise they are both acting on their own initiative without consulting each other. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect heads off to Italy, where it seems the residents have also been bitten by the 'small buildings are beautiful' bug. The most spectacular place he visits is so high up in the mountains that it's only accessible by helicopter, but this difficulty is more than made up for by the views seen from it. Back in Britain, George meets a man turning a wrecked private jet into a crash pad and a tattoo artist with big plans for an old railway carriage. George also challenges his pal, craftsman Will Hardie, to create a woodland retreat for less than the price of a family holiday

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George is joined by leading architects to help transform some of Britain's most unloved houses into desirable properties, beginning with the 1970s home of Tony and Sarah in the Vale of Glamorgan. The couple want rid of the pebbledash facade, small windows and dated decor, to create a great family home on a relatively modest budget of £60,000. They receive some bespoke and cutting-edge input from commercial and residential architect Greg Blee, with a plan that will link their home to the landscape beyond, including a Shard-like extension

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The presenter attempts to unlock the potential of old houses, including the rules when it comes to putting a kitchen in a period home. He also meets a woman who bought a 400-year-old Devon cottage, and has some solutions for turning this old house into a new home

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ptol Slattery hosts the first dinner party in Winchester, Hampshire, but his menu of seared scallops, lamb steak with baby new potatoes followed by chocolate mousse leaves his guests - waitress Patrician Pearson, DJ Francis Leigh, care-home worker Georgia Groves and estate agent William Tilsley - underwhelmed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Francis Leigh hosts the third dinner party in Winchester, hoping to dazzle his guests with his sunburnt chicken curry, a Thai meal with a twist and a dessert simply called 'sticky.' The entertainment for the night proves to be weird and wonderful as he dons a tutu and fur coat to serve the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Waitress Patricia Pearson hosts the second party in Winchester, but the decision to write her menu in Spanish causes confusion for one guest who mistakes lamb for llama. The Peruvian-themed feast is followed by a rendition of the country's national anthem and a traditional dance involving a candle and a donkey's jaw

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth night of the competition in Winchester, Georgia Groves plans a black-tie evening complete with a red carpet, posh frocks and a spray-tan booth. It appears to be going well until Patricia Pearson reveals what she thinks of Ptol Slattery and his wine antics

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent William Tilsley throws one last dinner party as a week of competitions in Winchester, Hampshire, draws to a close. The host plans to offer his guests a vegetarian menu, with a blind food-tasting game providing the evening's entertainment. As the night draws to a close, one of the competitors rises above the rest to become the winner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Ship Inn in Dymchurch, Kent, where James Tindall and Jessica Walton hope to impress their guests and be named best value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Thompson Hall Retreat in Norfolk, boasting stylish shepherd huts, and run by mother and daughter duo Amanda Benton and Becci Howlett

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The White House in Swansea, where guests James and Jessica have an unusual toilet encounter in their room

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Jacobs Plough in Bicester, Oxfordshire, run by manager Duncan Froomes and bar supervisor Ryan Hunt who like to mix banter with business

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and settle some scores. The Ship Inn is up first, with managers James Tindall and Jessica Walton wanting to let off steam about the surprise comments that made their visit a heated affair

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Clairvoyant Yvette Tamara hosts the first dinner party in north Kent, and the night gets off to a spooky start when data analyst John Tower and working mother Yemi Christopher-Soares discover a ghost-busting machine. Meanwhile, jeweller Lisa Townend is so impressed with Yvette's abilities that she wants to return for a psychic reading

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Data analyst John Tower hosts the second dinner party in north Kent, and lets his passion for military re-enactment show when he barks orders at the table. However, not all the guests enjoy his fatty pork stew and psychedelic dessert, and two argue over dating etiquette

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Project manager Yemi Christopher-Soares hosts the third dinner party in north Kent, where she hopes the guests will enjoy her Nigerian-inspired menu and appreciate her love of all things spicy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jono Simm hosts the penultimate dinner party in north Kent and is convinced his wholesome and hearty menu is the way to win. However, two of his guests are less than impressed by his cooking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Party-loving Lisa Townend hosts the final dinner party in north Kent, and hopes that a menu full of French fancies and innovative entertainment in the form of human roulette, will be enough to impress her guests and see her crowned winner of the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of private chef Ed Versluys and pilates instructor Vicky Anderson, who want to convert a concrete cowshed in the Somerset countryside into a three-bedroom home. With the help of one young builder and the knowledge they can learn from the internet, the couple plan to project manage the conversion themselves. However, they have only eight months and a budget of just over £200k to make a warm and comfortable home with straw bale walls and wide expanses of glass

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: After falling over during the night at home and being rushed into A&E, 85-year-old Maura faces potentially life-changing injuries. CT scans reveal broken bones in her spine, and her son and daughter-in-law must decide when to share the gravity of the situation with Maura and her granddaughter Meg. Meanwhile, 37-year-old doctor Jim arrives at St George's after a collision with a van while he was cycling to work. Despite putting on a brave face, scans reveal his injuries are more serious than first thought. Plus, a chef is treated after cutting her thumb while chopping peppers at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eighty-year-old Rose has fluid on her lungs and is having trouble breathing. Her daughters Christine, Sandra and Debbie put on brave faces around her bedside, convincing her that everything will be all right, but in the relatives' room there's high emotion as they contemplate life without their mother. Also in resus at King's College Hospital is Kevin, a 55-year-old trucker who has sustained injuries in a road accident

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The crews are stretched to their limits as they deal with a 19-year-old man who has suffered a motorbike crash, and an elderly woman showing signs of a stroke but refusing treatment as it means she will leave behind her beloved husband of over 40 years

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Revisiting some of the most dramatic incidents as Air Ambulance teams battle to save lives, including paraglider Lucasz receiving treatment for multiple fractures

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: After falling over during the night at home and being rushed into A&E, 85-year-old Maura faces potentially life-changing injuries. CT scans reveal broken bones in her spine, and her son and daughter-in-law must decide when to share the gravity of the situation with Maura and her granddaughter Meg. Meanwhile, 37-year-old doctor Jim arrives at St George's after a collision with a van while he was cycling to work. Despite putting on a brave face, scans reveal his injuries are more serious than first thought. Plus, a chef is treated after cutting her thumb while chopping peppers at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow patients at south west London's St George's hospital on royal wedding day. As Harry and Meghan tie the knot, patients and their relatives reflect on the meaning of lifelong love, devotion and commitment. Among those treated are David, 74, who is flown to St George's by air ambulance after falling from a ladder. Medics suspect internal bleeding and he is rushed to CT to assess the damage. His wife Lynda makes her way to the hospital as doctors try to prevent catastrophic blood loss

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Cheating in the football match backfires on Ted, prompting his Rugged Island rivals to think up a devilish forfeit - and leaving the priest trying to contrive a way of kicking Bishop Brennan's backside and getting away with it. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates a potentially devastating by-product of Greek yoghurt production

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Keen walkers Rosie and Michael Mulroy from Durham are looking for a holiday home from which they can explore the stunning Andalusian hills and countryside around Frigiliana in southern Spain. Jasmine Harman shows them five properties for their £120,000 budget, from town centre apartments to quaint village townhouses, but will any of them appeal to both heart and head?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Wales, where they pick up and restore a dentist's table and a barber's chair, and make a coffee table out of parquet flooring

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the Cotswolds to see who can create the most profit on two old lamps, and also take a spin in a Devonshire fire engine

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: New chateau owners Jayne and Steve need to get four en suite themed bedrooms ready for their new B&B business. For the Oriental suite, Jayne goes to visit Angel for help and advice. Plus, a chance to meet Brit Justin and his Aussie wife Annabelle, who are turning their chateau, with its sweeping views of the Pyrenees, into a family home

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Charlie Luxton meets Ness and Tony, who have set the bar high with their ambitious plans for their first ever self-build property

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Trecarne House in Liskeard, Cornwall, where owners Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan hope to demonstrate that their B&B offers the best value for money. The pair win the group's admiration by sharing their life story, but one guest stirs up intrigue by holding his cards close to his chest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners spend their second night of the competition at the Magna Carta at Windsor in Berkshire, a five-star floating bed and breakfast run by Captain Dominic Read. The guests are pleasantly surprised upon arrival, but not all are impressed by the standard of the accommodation - and a cracked teapot at the breakfast table leads to trouble for the proprietor

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third B&B of the week is Ash Cottage near Leeds Castle in Kent, where the unusual decor is an eye-opener for the guests but is not everyone's cup of tea. Trish and Tom get heated over the instant coffee before owners Rayne and Chris Deal take their fellow contestants to Chatham Dockyard to try their hands at rope-making

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final guest house of the week is A Room with a View in Brighton, where owner Stephen Bull and housekeeper Joanna Harris hope their nine-room establishment will impress the contestants. Things get off to a good start when Rayne and Chris Deal are impressed by the cleanliness of the property, but things take a turn for the worse when breakfast gets the thumbs down

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together to confront their critics face-to-face. Hosts of Trecarne House in Cornwall Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan raise issues with Magna Carta's Dominic Read on his mark for their hosting, while he has a bone to pick with them over criticism of his five-star floating B&B. Stephen and Joanna of A Room with a View in Brighton receive complaints about their breakfast, and tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a father and son building an ambitious clifftop retreat and a young architect embarking on his first commission - a garden pavilion for his grandmother. Master craftsman Will Hardie sets out to transform the humble beach hut into the most unlikely of holiday getaways, and in Germany, George visits a modern house in a medieval town

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's hornbills have survived a fire that swept through their home, but it may have derailed their plans for chicks, while meerkat matriarch Huskie seems to have lost her breeding instincts after losing her solitary pup nine months ago. Is she finally ready to be a mum again? Sun bear Milli already has her paws full bringing up her feisty daughter Kyra. However, the one-year-old's cuteness belies her devilish and destructive nature

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie finishes her mother Isobel's apartment. Painted and decorated, it now has her fathers framed pictures on the walls, a stunning 200-year-old mahogany canopy, plus furniture. Elsewhere, Jayne and Steve finish the Oriental Room and are ready to take in guests

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Architect Patrick Bradley has come up with an unusual £100,000 house design built out of four 45ft shipping containers, welded together to form a giant cross and cantilevered over the top of a stream on the family farm in Co Derry. His mother is hoping the new home will help her son find a girlfriend, but the small budget and tight schedule soon pose problems. Kevin McCloud follows his progress

programme.title: Double Jeopardy (1999)
programme.desc: A man fakes his own death and frames his wife for murder, but after six years in prison she is released. Since the woman has already served her time, she has nothing to lose by really killing him - but her mission of vengeance is complicated by a zealous parole officer determined to stop her. Thriller, starring Ashley Judd, Tommy Lee Jones, Bruce Greenwood and Annabeth Gish

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow Aydigul, 38, who has suspected sepsis following major abdominal surgery. Her sister is at her bedside throughout, and discusses their childhood in Tajikistan and her extraordinary strength in the face of adversity. Plus, emergency consultant Ahmed rushes to save the life of a woman who has an abdominal aortic aneurysm

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, inviting Sean Lock and Miles Jupp to take on guest captain Alan Carr and Roisin Conaty. Ivan Brackenbury - aka Tom Binns - joins wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras follow Aydigul, 38, who has suspected sepsis following major abdominal surgery. Her sister is at her bedside throughout, and discusses their childhood in Tajikistan and her extraordinary strength in the face of adversity. Plus, emergency consultant Ahmed rushes to save the life of a woman who has an abdominal aortic aneurysm

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt visits the town of Tequila on the trail of Mexico's national drink as he tries to find out where the idea of a worm in the bottle came from, and Jimmy Doherty learns how Poles transform carp into a much-loved national delicacy. Kate Quilton visits Spain to explore the difference between tangerines, mandarins, satsumas and clementines

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp looks back to the 1970s for vintage inspiration in this bite-sized episode. The presenter creates crocheted jellyfish and a colourful felt rug with the help of two of Britain's most gifted craftspeople

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Roger and Obie Pearce want a slice of the Spanish good life. Obie has never been to Spain before, and Roger hasn't visited since he was in the army 40 years ago, but they are determined to relocate to Almeria where Roger's health could benefit from the warm climate. Ben Hillman sets out to find them their perfect home on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole finds a treat for restorer Guy, and Simon O'Brien creates stunning table lamps from old theatre lights

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo head to Wales to see how can create the most profit on items, including an oil dispenser, fire grate, chaise longue and even a catamaran

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick visits Stephanie to help get the original chateau pizza oven working, while Annabelle and Justin return from holiday to find their chateau infested with bees

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets people as they bid to turn an empty plot of land into their dream home on an affordable budget. Adam and Vicki Nicholl have become tired of city life and decide to move back to the Hertfordshire village of Pirton where they grew up to build a barn-style property in the garden of Adam's mum's home. The pair are convinced they can save around £100,000 simply by not purchasing an existing property

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is Nateby Inn in Cumbria, where landlady Gaynor Walker is ready with a warm welcome. A trip to Gaynor's local brewery turns out to be a barrel of laughs when one guest beats another in a cask-rolling competition, before a broken cooker creates chaos in the kitchen the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Outfields Farm Bed and Breakfast in Ravensden, Bedfordshire, on their second stay, where proprietors Graham and Julia Ashley treat them to an afternoon of indoor sky-diving before hosting a dinner filled with surprises. The guests enjoy a good night's sleep, but one of the owners is expecting hassle at breakfast time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to At Home in Chiswick, west London, where artist Bob Osbourne appears to take a rather laid-back approach to running his B&B. On arrival, guests are pleasantly surprised by their first impressions of the communal living space-come-mini art gallery - but it's not long before they are dishing the dirt

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition draws to a close at the Ammonite Lodge guesthouse in Chard, Somerset, where owners Andrew and Clare Ashmore hope to excite their guests with a game of skittles. During the final dinner of the week, the competitors discuss their first impressions of each other, and Bob and Julia share some amusing observations with the group

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners confront their critics face to face, and the winners are announced. Nateby Inn host Gaynor takes issue with Graham and Julia's reduced marks for cobwebs. The conversation becomes heated when Outfields Farm's owners tackle Gaynor's complaints in return, and Georgie jumps to their defence. Artist Bob Osborne has a long list of grievances he wants to address, and Julia is left cringing when her previous comments rebound on her

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets a father-of-three building a campervan for less than £700, made from old CDs and vinyl records, and a single dad who is renovating an oil-rig escape pod to make a home for himself and sons on the water. The presenter also continues his German road trip with a visit to the Tyrolean mountains, where he finds a house that looks like a cross between a large bird and a UFO, and he and Will Hardie save a decrepit old wartime lookout shed to use as the basis for their floating beach hut

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras follow adolescent babirusa Tolo, who lives with his devoted mother Sula. They are very close, enjoying mud baths and pedicures together. But Sula has a hoof problem so they must be separated for the vet to intervene, and keepers are concerned for Tolo's wellbeing in her absence. Meanwhile, laid-back rock hyraxes Daissie and her partner Nungu are expecting their eighth litter. With the birth imminent, the couple's life of ease could be a thing of the past

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: New owners Amy and Marc have big dreams to turn their 20-room chateau into a B&B and yoga retreat. They first need to replace their defunct sewage system and create a pipe network within the chateau's ancient walls. Meanwhile, musicians Ben and Billie start renovating their chateau's final untouched room - the old library - and restore the skylight complete with its original Victorian mechanism

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Tracy and Steve Fox want to build an 'urban shed' featuring two studios, three bedrooms and a double-height space with a walkway, made out of industrial-style materials including corrugated cement fibreboard and 20ft panels of polycarbonate sheeting. Having discovered an old milk yard tucked away behind some flats and shops in south-east London, their long-held desire to build a highly unconventional family home and workspace begins. But their choice of unorthodox materials proves challenging and costly. Kevin McCloud follows their progress

programme.title: Chatsworth House: A Great British Year
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at the stately home belonging to the Duke and Duchess of Devonshire. In the first edition, the Covid-19 pandemic breaks out just as the house is about to be opened to the public for the year, sending staff racing to make the house safe for visitors in time

programme.title: Christmas at Highclere and Warwick Castles
programme.desc: Part one of two. A behind-the-scenes look at life in Highclere Castle - the setting of the popular television series and film Downton Abbey - as they deck their halls and prepare to celebrate Christmas in their own unique way. The programme follows the small team of dedicated staff who are tasked with creating seasonal cheer in the castle, as they race to get everything prepared in time to welcome small groups of guests for guided tours and tea, as well as a virtual gin cocktail party hosted by the Earl and Countess of Carnarvon

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Forty-year-old Tania is rushed to St George's with life-threatening injuries, having been knocked over while crossing a road, while semi-professional footballer Lilli arrives in A&E after being elbowed in the face during a match. Seventy-seven-year-old Edwin is rushed to resus bleeding from a tumour on his neck, and as the medical team examines the wound, his partner Jeanette explains how their romance blossomed in later life. When a maxillofacial specialist arrives to plan the next stage of Edwin's treatment, it forces his family to confront the very painful truth

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, inviting Sean Lock and Rob Beckett to take on Jon Richardson and Claudia Winkleman. Nick Mohammed and Joe Wilkinson join wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants that he set out to save, including The Mixing Bowl, The Olde Stone Mill, Peter's and Campania. Have their owners pulled themselves out of their nightmares?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Forty-year-old Tania is rushed to St George's with life-threatening injuries, having been knocked over while crossing a road, while semi-professional footballer Lilli arrives in A&E after being elbowed in the face during a match. Seventy-seven-year-old Edwin is rushed to resus bleeding from a tumour on his neck, and as the medical team examines the wound, his partner Jeanette explains how their romance blossomed in later life. When a maxillofacial specialist arrives to plan the next stage of Edwin's treatment, it forces his family to confront the very painful truth

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the national dish. Kate Quilton looks into where multivitamins come from and how much we need them, while Matt Tebbutt visits the UK's leading clotted cream producer in Cornwall and an astonishing algae farm in the desert in Israel

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The seafood chef continues to explore the Far East's most diverse food cultures with a visit to Sri Lanka, where he discovers a wealth of hot and spicy vegetable curries. He then ventures on to Bali and finds food has a religious significance on the island, before sampling what he believes is the best roast pork he has ever tasted

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compete in a 1950s-style race from London to Edinburgh. On the footplate of the A1 Tornado steam train, Jeremy has to feed the boiler with a constant supply of coal, while Richard braves the saddle of a Vincent Black Shadow motorbike and James drives an old Jaguar XK120 as the trio discover what Top Gear might have been like 60 years ago. Michael Schumacher drives the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond, Jeremy Clarkson and James May try to find the perfect car for 17-year-olds, dealing with insurance companies, accident repairs and a muddy music festival car park in the process. Richard also visits Abu Dhabi to test the Lamborghini Murcielago SV and stages a race between the 1000hp Bugatti Veyron and the McLaren F1. programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Featuring all the thrills and spills from the 2013 Red Bull Soapbox Race in London, as the crews unleash their four-wheeled, motorless creations on a challenging downhill course littered with obstacles

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank celebrates his birthday with a picking bonanza, and the guys make a widow's dreams come true by brokering a deal to honour her husband

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike struggles to free a massive vintage sign from a tight corner and the guys strike a seemingly impossible deal with the 'Sign Boss'
