programme.desc: Host Rob Brydon and team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack return with previously unseen material from the ninth series of the comedy panel show. Features a stellar cast of celebrity guests, who try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon introduces a seasonal special of the comedy panel game. Musical comedian Bill Bailey, actor and writer Ruth Jones, comedian and presenter Jo Brand and athlete-turned-presenter Kelly Holmes join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack, trying to hoodwink their opponents with a few festive fibs or facts about themselves

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: David Mitchell is joined by MasterChef judge Gregg Wallace and actor Nigel Havers, while Lee Mack teams up with writer and comedian Charlie Brooker and actress Nina Wadia, as the comedy panel show hosted by Rob Brydon continues

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by actor Jon Hamm, star of Mad Men and Baby Driver, for a yuletide trek around Hong Kong - the most visited and most vertical city on the planet. They join the other 26.7 million tourists, as they gorge themselves on questionable foodstuffs, traditional transportation and the world's largest seated Buddha statue. After resting at the Peninsula Hotel for some colonial opulence, they sample street food and get their fortunes read, before taking to the air for a bird's eye view by helicopter

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall: Unpacked
programme.desc: A look at some of the moments that nearly stopped the Expedition teams in their tracks, as well as the points where taking one step further meant no chance of turning back

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Stephen Mangan hosts an extended edition of the satirical current affairs quiz, with UKIP parliamentary spokesperson Suzanne Evans and comedian Henning Wehn joining regular team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the week's leading stories

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts an extended edition of the quiz with a difference, beginning the 'K' series with a range of fiendish questions on such topics as knees and knockers. Regular panellist Alan Davies is joined by Sara Pascoe, Jack Whitehall and David Mitchell, with points being awarded for interesting answers as well as correct ones

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.desc: One half of The Mighty Boosh and co-host of The Great British Bake Off Noel Fielding takes over the hosting reins of the long-running show as he comperes an evening of stand-up at London's Hammersmith Apollo. The comedian, actor, artist, DJ and musician treats the audience to his own peculiar brand of surreal humour, before introducing routines by two up-and-coming stars of the comedy circuit, with south Londoner Dane Baptiste and Irishman Al Porter taking to the stage at the famous venue

programme.title: Hypothetical
programme.desc: Comedy game show hosted by Josh Widdicombe and James Acaster, in which leading comedians are posed increasingly absurd hypothetical situations and scored on how well they would deal with them. The first episode features Tom Allen, Rob Beckett, Jessica Knappett and Liza Tarbuck

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

Driving a clapped-out old VW camper van around the Galicia region on the Atlantic coast, Rick discovers places off the beaten track as he samples classic dishes of rural Spain, a country he believes has been underrated in cookery circles until quite recently

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are in Russia as the motoring magazine returns, taking part in a race across the urban landscape of St Petersburg. James defends the honour of the car in a very small Renault, Richard tries to prove that pedalling is faster by riding a bicycle, while Jeremy attempts to demonstrate that water is the quickest way across town by piloting a hovercraft. To make matters more complicated, all three presenters are racing not only one another but also the Stig, who is making his way toward the finish line by public transport. Plus, the new Lamborghini Huracan is put through its paces and singer-songwriter Ed Sheeran takes to the test track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall

This vast wilderness of pristine forests and towering table-top mountains is one of the most inaccessible terrains on the planet

programme.title: Impossible Engineering

programme.title: David Bowie: Finding Fame
programme.desc: The final part of Francis Whately's trilogy of films on Bowie's life, telling the story of the five years when many of the ideas that would help him become an icon were first born. Starting in 1966, soon after David Jones changed his name to David Bowie, the film traces his interest in everything from Holst and Pinky and Perky to Anthony Newley and Tibetan Buddhism, and how he used all of these influences to create not only Ziggy Stardust, but the material for his entire career

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How Japan's early victories over Allied forces during the Second World War convinced its people that their strength and discipline would bring them victory. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The Allied offensive in the Pacific, where America's two-pronged attack led to heavy casualties on both sides, as the Japanese mounted a ferocious defence. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The Enola Gay drops the first atomic bomb on Hiroshima in August 1945 as America bids to secure an unconditional surrender from the Japanese, even though conventional bombing raids had already flattened the country. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The award-winning documentary series reveals how the end of the Second World War resulted in Britain's military and economic exhaustion, leaving Europe at the mercy of sparring superpowers as the Cold War era dawned. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Jeremy Isaacs' classic documentary explores the Second World War's powerful legacy. programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Barrington Court in Somerset, where discoveries include a toy Noah's Ark from the 1920s, an Elizabethan wine jug found at a car-boot sale and a £12 charity shop bracelet that dates back to the Victorian era. programme.desc: The second of four FANtasy bike winners is revealed as the guys head to Texas. The OCC crew spends some time with Susan Morisset to learn how best to customise her chopper. The winner heads out to OCC and gets a tour of the facility and a shopping spree at the retail store. Once receiving her bike, she and Sr go for a truly memorable ride

programme.title: Mighty Cruise Ships
programme.desc: Documentary offering an insight into the most impressive cruise ships ever built. The first episode looks at the Paul Gauguin, which was designed to sail the shallow seas of Tahiti, Fiji and the South Pacific, visiting smaller ports that much larger ships cannot reach

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The Umiak I, the world's most powerful ice-breaking carrier, and how it delivers supplies to a remote Canadian nickel factory and returns cargo worth more than £63million to the mainland

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: More everyday items are put under the microscope, examining how pressed glass, pick-up truck cabs, alpaca yarn and utility knives are made

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The manufacturing processes behind the production of life casts, cooker hoods, compression hosiery and electric motorcycles

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The processes used to turn used aluminium cans into planes and rockets. Plus, the way in which a traditional Black Forest cuckoo clock is carved

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: The team of experts tries to restore three family heirlooms and treasured possessions to their former glory, working on a clock, a carving of a flying fish and an accordion

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and Will Kirk restore a piano stool, clock restoration expert Steve works on a vintage telephone and antique projector specialist Richard Rigby enlivens a magic lantern

programme.title: Abalone Wars
programme.desc: In Port Lincoln the abalone crews take advantage of a break in the weather to seize their share of this $35billion trade. However, the tight time-line threatens to force them to take stupid risks

programme.desc: Shawn Pomrenke is hurt in a bar brawl and the future of the Christine Rose is put at risk, while the Wild Ranger crew struggles with a leak and an injury to one of the team

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie's house-moving crew faces a difficult job transporting a large house in dangerous, wet conditions. And, Mark is on a deadline to transport mining gear into opal country

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers: Trading Up
programme.desc: Mike Brewer returns to the UK to find a buyer for his Hindustan Ambassador. Plus, he gets a good deal on a Triumph Spitfire and Land Rover Defender, and hopes to make a profit

programme.title: Chasing Classic Cars
programme.desc: Wayne Carini prepares to attend the Pris d'LeMons car exhibition, and hopes his Volvo P18 Wagon will stand out among the vehicles on show

programme.title: Chasing Classic Cars
programme.desc: Wayne Carini checks out a 1933 Duesenberg SJ that has not been taken out on the road for 30 years, and hopes a heated garage has done a good job of keeping the vehicle in top shape

programme.desc: Bike guru Henry Cole and ace mechanic Sam Lovegrove are off to Cornwall. They meet a collector whose cottage is like a transport museum, chock-full with memorabilia, penny farthings and lights of all description - watched over by Buster, the guard rabbit

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in East Sussex and Hertfordshire, with finds that include a Victorian egg incubator

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard bargains hard in Frome, Somerset, then in Dumfriesshire visits an estate that has been in the same family for several generations and is full of fascinating antiques

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Arid conditions promise a rough ride for Steve as he travels from Perth into central Australia. Mick has a punishing climb over the Great Dividing Range

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: The Restorers
programme.desc: Sculptor Nick and gilder Ruth team up to restore a very expensive antique table. Meanwhile, upholsterer Craig has difficulties fixing up a mid-20th century classic design

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard explores an Aladdin's cave of magic carpets in Cumbria and royal biographer Colin Campbell reveals antiques with tragic history from her romantic castle

programme.title: Mighty Cruise Ships
programme.desc: The Roald Amundsen sails where few ships will ever go. The vessel was built specifically to take passengers on an unforgettable voyage to Antarctica

programme.title: Sydney Harbour Patrol
programme.desc: As a police boat crashes onto rocks, a salvage diver risks his life to save nearby beach goers from the debris. Plus, a fisheries officer wrestles a man-eating shark. Documentary following the elite team who work day and night to keep the world-famous waterfront running.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: A look at how thousands of tonnes of grapefruit are picked and processed, and how conveyor belts that carry millions of pieces of luggage every year are built

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: Examining how the world's finest harp strings are made, how they build roof windows that can keep out a hurricane, and how to make Belgian waffles

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Edd China completes the BMW 635CSi renovation project, Mike Brewer values the vehicle and goes looking for a potential buyer

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: The guys visit FANtasy winner Joseph McClendon, who sold his bike to pay for his mother's medical treatment. They also The guys visit the final bike winner, Brian King, a born-and-raised chopper-lover who was left a paraplegic by a car accident

programme.title: Mighty Cruise Ships

programme.title: Mighty Ships

programme.title: How It's Made

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The development and production of custom knee braces, ductless air conditioners, window film and motorcycle exhaust systems

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night of the competition in Boston, Lincolnshire, Adrian hopes that his spicy food and surprises will help him scoop the £1,000 prize. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Polish-born carer Sylwia hosts the fourth party of the competition in Boston, Lincolnshire, and hopes her European menu will charm her guests. However, the growing friction between diners Annika and Carolyn threatens to spoil the evening, and the host's chances of winning the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final dinner party night in Boston, and the hard-to-please foxhunter Carolyn is planning on using a charm offensive to win over the guests after having criticised each of them during the week. She has offended Annika, called Katy fake, found fault with Sywia's food, and reprimanded Adie, but still believes she may be able to turn things around

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Donna and Martin, from Dagenham, east London, seek a holiday home for the whole family to enjoy on the stunning Costa Dorada in Spain. They have a budget of £65,000 and want a one-bedroom apartment with outside space close to the bustling town of Salou. Jasmine Harman lines up five properties for them to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Cliff and Angela from Nottingham fell in love with St Lucia when they were on a Caribbean cruise, and now, after discovering their pensions aren't performing as well as they'd like, they've decided to invest in a property there. Can Jasmine Harman find a place that will be a sound investment and also give them and their family an idyllic holiday home for years to come, all for their £120,000 budget?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Fay Lewis has dreamed of moving to Spain for 20 years. Now, with her house in the UK sold and her bags packed, she's ready to take the plunge. Jasmine Harman shows Fay five properties around the Axarquia region of the Costa del Sol for her budget of 95,000 euros

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: B&B operators Linda and Mike are looking for a holiday home to use as a winter retreat while their business is closed. Linda fell in love with Antigua 20 years ago and is taking Mike along for the first time on a property-finding mission. Scarlette Douglas shows the couple five potential properties within their £260,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ian Snowley and Kay Marriot fell in love with the volcanic landscapes and coasts of Lanzarote, and are now determined to buy a house that they can use to explore the island further. Scarlette Douglas shows the couple five properties, hoping to maximise their budget of £150,000

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he heads for West Babylon, New York, where he helped the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts, before returning to Davide in Boston, an Italian restaurant run by two warring brothers. Finally, he visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island, run by hot-headed owner Abby

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jersey's Spanish Pavilion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eatery's fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chef's attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: A round-up of memorable moments from the show over the course of the year, as armchair critics including Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Mary and Marina, the Siddiquis, and Amira and Iqra give their thoughts on the year's TV output

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding, Matt Lucas, Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood get the New Year celebrations started in the tent. Joining them are Helena and Henry from 2019, Nancy from 2014, and 2018 winner Rahul, all hoping to impress the judges with their skills and creativity and take home the coveted Festive Star Baker title

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is the man in charge as singer Fleur East, former Queen of the Jungle Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo and actors John Thomson, Nina Wadia and Natalie Cassidy take on everything the maze throws at them. As always, they face an assortment of skill, physical, mystery and mental challenges in their bid to win as much time as possible in the Crystal Dome

programme.title: Britain's Wildest Weather
programme.desc: Footage of the most extreme weather conditions in the UK over the past year, from the worst floods in a decade and a freak landslide in Fife, to an account of being in a house when it is struck by lightning. The programme also explains the scientific reasons behind the wildfire that destroyed one of the UK's most precious nature reserves, as well as a look back at record-breaking days of both heat and rain

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Sam Smith and Joe Wicks join Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty for an early New Year celebration. On the menu tonight are Italian-inspired pork and crispy double crackling, laid on a bed of veg and creamy beans and topped with a tangy herb salsa. Sam also contributes a childhood favourite food, blending the flavours of Mexico and Scotland - haggis tacos complete with home-made corn tortillas, red onion pickle, salsa and avocado, while Joe gets a masterclass in making fresh pasta

programme.title: Celebrity Snoop Dogs
programme.desc: A special festive edition of the show in which celebrities' dogs provide a unique perspective on their homes. The special twist this time is that celebrity dog owners Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen, Gok Wan and Joanna Page are watching on and competing against each other to throw the others off the scent as their four-legged friends roam around their lavishly decorated homes

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from east Kent host dinner parties, with the highest-scoring duo winning the cash prize of £1,000. Outspoken estate agent Sean and his girlfriend Beth kick off the competition with a Welsh-themed menu. Day two sees Marcus and Miguel lay on a Malaysian feast, but Sean's teasing of his girlfriend steals the limelight. Finally it's Geoff and Jill's chance to shine with their hippy vibe and Indian themed menu, so it's a battle of the curries. But whether their blend of spices and loved-up atmosphere is enough to bag them the grand remains to be seen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Mozz from Bury hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in and around Manchester, treating his guests to garlic stilton mushrooms and poached pears

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, voiceover artist and film extra Matt cooks up a Jewish Friday night supper, including his mum's traditional chicken soup

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Budding author and mum-of-five Cleona is next to host in Manchester, hoping a menu based on her Jamaican roots will get her guests onside

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian radio content director James hosts the fourth party in Manchester, hoping his menu containing Chinese cuisine and his mum's cake recipe can land him the top spot

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Events boss Sharon hosts the final night in Manchester. With her hearty decadent menu on offer, she has to win over Cleona after a bust up on from Cleona's turn as host. Sharon's skills and decorum are put to the test, though Mozz, Matt and James are on hand for moral support

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's relatives reluctantly tell him the brutal truth about his performance as a panellist on Roy Firestone's live TV sports show. American comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray attends classes to learn a range of parenting skills, hoping they will help him be a better father to Ally and the twins - but ends up using them to keep Frank and Marie in line. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Cafe Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The return of the programme in which property experts offer advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad. Hugh and Bruce are looking to relocate from Scotland to Alicante in south-eastern Spain, so Jasmine Harman lines up five properties for their budget of £135,000

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Film actor John Hannah, Channel 4 News anchor Krishnan Guru-Murthy, actress Nicola Coughlan, television and radio presenter Rylan Clark-Neal and renowned dancer-now-Strictly head judge Shirley Ballas complete a series of tasks in the hard-fought, high-stakes, ridiculous game show. Assistant Alex Horne helps coax the contestants, but it's Taskmaster Greg Davies who determines the victor

programme.title: Jon Richardson: Old Man Tour
programme.desc: A chance to see a live performance recorded at Blackpool's historic Grand Theatre, on what was the final night of the comedian's sell-out, 158-date UK and Ireland tour. Here, Jon takes to the stage to comment - and generally complain - on topics including parenthood, Brexit and haircuts. The question of why nobody but him can correctly load a dishwasher is also raised. Alas, Jon can offer no solutions to all the problems he identifies, but nevertheless provides plenty of mirth as he fails to reach a viable conclusion to his grouses

programme.title: Britain's Bestselling Toys
programme.desc: Keith Lemon presents this countdown of the greatest playthings of the past 50 years, remembering the Christmas must-haves and big crazes from the 1970s to the present day. Famous faces tell their childhood stories, while social historians, toy designers and advertising experts discuss which toys didn't quite make the list, those that have stood the test of time and which ones were more than likely broken by Boxing Day

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: First of a two-part special taking viewers behind the scenes of a Cambridgeshire police investigation into a woman who is plotting to have her ex-husband killed. A man handed police a secretly recorded conversation that appeared to show his girlfriend offering to pay someone to commit murder, and DS Mike Barnshaw has to work out whether the recording is evidence that she really wanted him dead or is pillow talk with a man she has picked up on a dating site

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes with UK Sotheby's International Realty, with the coronavirus pandemic having seen a surge of super-rich buyers leaving towns and cities. The brokers set out to sell a property in Highgate, north London, that is on the market for £40 million, as well the home of former Liverpool FC CEO Peter Moore on the Wirral

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: After seven months, the family reaches the final stage of building their new home, with only waterproofing remaining to be done. They also attend the annual mid-Somerset Show to celebrate all things agricultural from the area, where Sarah is given the honour of judging the cheese contest and Titan the hybrid hen is entered in the poultry competition. Graham also visits the South Devon Chilli Farm to get some tips on making chilli honey

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In the first episode of a new series, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Lucy and Lynton in East Grinstead who are unsure whether to sell their home or renovate instead. Lucy is set on staying where they are as it's the first place she has owned, but Lynton finds the house claustrophobic, and longs to find a new home they could fall in love with

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tries to teach Ally a lesson by resuming the piano lessons he gave up 25 years earlier - and finds himself wondering why he ever stopped receiving tuition in the first place. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. programme.title: Cast Away (2000)
programme.desc: A manager for an American courier service has to fend for himself when a plane crash leaves him stranded alone on a desert island. Initially panic-stricken, he overcomes his terror to survive for four years on his own before building a raft and setting off on an epic journey back home. Adventure drama, starring Tom Hanks, Helen Hunt, Nick Searcy, Lari White and Chris Noth

programme.title: Britain's Wildest Weather

Detectives are determined not to release her, but DC Louisa Abbott fears she is dealing with the cleverest criminal she has ever encountered

programme.title: Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: As 2020 comes to an end, this special edition returns to Jimmy Doherty's Suffolk farm and wildlife park where there is festive spirit in the air. As the winter jobs get ticked off the list, Jimmy looks back at the highlights from spring and autumn, from escaping meerkat Steve McQueen and Littlefoot the lamb, to frolicking tapirs and tiny piglets. Now, in the season of goodwill to all, Jimmy and the team prepare for a very special Christmas present for Fern, the orphaned roe deer

programme.title: Chitty Flies Again with David Walliams
programme.desc: To celebrate the 50th anniversary of iconic musical film Chitty Chitty Bang Bang, David Walliams wants to bring the magic of this timeless classic to life by building a real-life Chitty Chitty Bang Bang car that will actually fly. Cameras follow David's attempt to achieve a world first and pull off a Christmas miracle

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The story of Lesley and Mark Irwin, who fell foul of a single mother and confidence trickster. After several months, the tenant fell behind with the rent and it was discovered she had advertised the home as a rental property and stole deposits from unwitting students hoping to move into the area. Plus, a family living in a cramped and cold multiple-occupancy house in south London, and have to share a bathroom and kitchen with other tenants, seek help from Lewisham Council

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A couple of landlords fall foul of two young YouTube stars who are using their rental property as a film set - and to make matters worse, the tenants have stopped paying their rent but are refusing to leave. In Chelmsford, eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock when he tries to evict a group of squatters from an abandoned printworks, and in Hampstead, London, a landlord investigates when neighbours complain about noise from one of his flats

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord offers a former tenant the use of a spare room until she gets back on her feet, but then struggles to evict her - and things get even more difficult when the woman moves her partner in. A landlord travelling abroad has to return to London when her tenants stop paying the rent, and Harrow Council officers find 30 mattresses in a flat designed for four people

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Landlord Nicholas Parrington discovers a couple are subletting his house, just months after a previous tenant had turned the property into a brothel, while investors in a community centre for children are aghast when squatters move into their building. In Lewisham, the council's Rogue Landlord Unit raids one of their main streets, on the lookout for slum conditions, illegal overcrowding and criminal activities

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire agents try to collect nearly £2,500 in unpaid parking fines, while officers Matt and Garry head to the West Midlands to recover £4,500 owed from a debtor to his former girlfriend. Agents travel to south-east London looking to collect £3,000 owed by a taxi company

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south-east London, officers Gary and Cona chase a debt of nearly £50,000 in unpaid rent, leading to a feisty confrontation with the debtor. Agents Gary and Paul try to recover over £2,000 owed by a teenager to a local garage in Kent, and officers Max and Paul head to south-west London on the trail of a film producer who owes £8,000 to financial advisers

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Coventry, the sheriffs chase £10,000 owed by a publican to a contractor. The property appears to be empty, but after finding an ingenious method of entry, Matt and Garry are confronted by a surprised and angry landlord. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to central London to try to recover almost £8,000 owed by a former peer of the realm to a firm of accountants

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Sheriffs Stewart and Elmor try to recover almost £2,400 from a company director for unpaid invoices in Manchester, but face a fierce reception from a family who deny the debtor lives or trades from the address. Meanwhile, agents Gary and Cona in Kent chase nearly £4,000 owed by a couple for unpaid rent on a previous tenancy

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: In Shropshire, a man moves in to his parents' home to help put a stop to a neighbour's harassment, but events escalate into violence. In Essex, a mother and her daughter find what seems to be the perfect house, only for their lives to be made a misery after they object to a planning application for an extension. Two elderly residents who feel they are the victims of noise from next door have to deny any wrongdoing themselves when the police arrive on their doorstep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A Devon woman finds herself spending a night in the cells after a dispute with a neighbour who just happens to be a policeman, while a York man gets an unexpected soaking after an argument with the person next door. In Glasgow, an upset over an invitation leads to a hospital visit and a criminal record for one unhappy homeowner

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring two quarrelling neighbours who record each other's every moment on CCTV and in diaries. Their dispute began when Thomas parked his caravan on a quiet cul-de-sac, much to the annoyance of his neighbour Mrs Potter. Plus, how a shared driveway pushed Susie to breaking point when her neighbour Grant put her young daughter at risk. Susie decided to install gates across the drive and use it for family barbecues, but Grant took matters into his own hands and it ended in a trip to the police station for him

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A man living in Cumbria takes issue with his neighbour's habit of letting his menagerie of chickens, cockerels, parrots and other birds freely wander along a residential road, and is even more disturbed by the fact that some of his fellow residents don't seem to have a problem with it. A former urban couple who moved to a rural valley in north Wales to breed horses enter open conflict with the owners of a nearby yurt business, whose fireworks parties spooked one of their prized beasts, resulting in an injury. Finally, a Romanian woman finds herself subject to abuse when she tries to set up a new home with her daughter in Wigan

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker (2017)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on two residential disputes that escalated from complaints about noise-making to far more serious quarrels. Warren and Sharee detail how their peaceful lives in a quiet Birmingham suburb were ruined when new neighbour Harry moved in. Harry complained of noise the pair knew wasn't coming from their household, an accusation he would level more than once, and with increasing intensity. Finally, when the hostile Harry pulled out a gun and threatened the couple over their garden fence, they were forced to sell up and move out. However, even after relocating, it seemed their nightmare was not over. Also featured is the story of Jill, who was just a teenager when Barry, who lived with his parents next-door, became fixated on her family making a racket. Brushing off the grievance, Jill and her relatives tried to get on with their lives, but one autumn day the feud took a tragic, life-changing turn

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A group of residents in Guildford object when the occupant of a one-bedroom council flat decides to transform his home into a 'cannabis cafe'. In a small community in Wales, new arrivals cause a stir when they decide to convert a local pub into their new home, and in Lincolnshire, a young father becomes the victim of a violent assault after asking the man living in the flat below his to keep the noise down

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The series investigating residential disputes continues, turning attention to feuds that turned violent. Among the stories highlighted are that of former paratrooper Rod who was attacked outside his own home by a knife-wielding neighbour, and 71-year-old Michael, a Suffolk villager whose fellow residents claim he has systematically harassed them, culminating in an assault in which he punched one of his neighbours repeatedly - an incident that was caught on camera. The programme also considers the devastating consequences when personal altercations end up escalating into neighbourhood wars, revealing how a conflict between the Webbs and the Browns in transformed their street in Devon into a war-zone

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: The observational documentary shedding light on residential disputes concludes with an insight into how suburban feuds can breed anger, suspicion and fear, and cause people to resort to subterfuge to get their way. Among the stories highlighted are that of Leslie, whose neighbours began capturing his activities on film, convinced that his trade business was illegal, and Phil, who was assigned a restraining order after his ex-mayor neighbour made recordings that proved he was harassing her. Also featured are two tales in which old friendships were ruined when certain parties resorted to breaching each other's privacy and round-the-clock surveillance

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Mitch are on the trail of £2,500 in unpaid parking tickets in Cardiff, and while the debtor is not at home, they notice his car is sporting false number plates and call the police. The duo also face an angry defendant in Swindon when trying to collect £2,000 for unpaid rent on a lock-up, while in Buckinghamshire, Matt and Garry consider seizing a haul of luxury watches to pay more than £16,000 owed to a landlord

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi apologises to Shane and he is glad to reconnect, but things with Dipi are not so simple. It is party season, and Roxy decides to loosen things up between Levi and Bea

programme.title: Fergie & Andrew: The Duke & Duchess of Disaster
programme.desc: Documentary examining the scandals that have surrounded Prince Andrew and Sarah Ferguson since their marriage in 1986 and subsequent divorce. The programme examines the succession of PR gaffes and undercover tabloid stings that followed in the Duchess of York's wake once she was no longer part of the royal family, as well as looking into the prince's friendship with convicted paedophile Jeffrey Epstein

programme.title: Meghan & Harry: The New Revelations
programme.desc: A look at the events that led to the Duke and Duchess of Sussex stepping back from the royal family, with the couple growing frustrated with a pecking order that left them overshadowed by others. This documentary delves into new claims and explores the speculation contained in recent books about the royals, testing their credibility and voracity and trying to unravel what actually happened

programme.title: Inside

Plus, why the company chose purple as its defining colour, and how comedian Lenny Henry came to be the face of the brand

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: Cameras focus on Mia, who sells her trade from apartments across Birmingham. She owes £3,000 in rent and is facing possible eviction - unless she can earn enough money to keep a roof over her head

programme.title: Columbo: Swan Song (1974)
programme.desc: A country singer arranges for his wife and his underage lover to both die in a phoney plane crash after his spouse diverts all his money to her religious causes in revenge for his affair. He is confident he remains above suspicion, but Columbo realises something does not add up and sets out to wrest a confession from the musician. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Johnny Cash and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Columbo: Troubled Waters (1975)
programme.desc: The slovenly sleuth sets out on a pleasure cruise to Acapulco. However, one of the passengers is planning to kill his lover to stop her blackmailing him, and has arranged a cast-iron alibi. But when the crime is discovered, the captain looks to Columbo to solve the mystery. Drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Vaughn, Dean Stockwell, Patrick Macnee and Poupee Bocar

programme.title: Columbo: It's All in the Game (1993)
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite and her daughter discover they have been seeing the same man, and have him killed. When Columbo investigates the case, the mother is determined to make sure all his attention is on her and not her daughter, and an unlikely romance develops between sleuth and suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Faye Dunaway

programme.title: Columbo: Try and Catch Me (1977)
programme.desc: A grieving crime writer blames her niece's husband for her death and concocts a plan to take revenge, luring him to her walk-in vault, before locking him in and leaving him to die. She then puts her knowledge of the criminal mind to good use by covering her tracks, and although Columbo strongly suspects foul play, he finds clues are thin on the ground. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Ruth Gordon

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: A Case of Immunity (1975)
programme.desc: A senior adviser to the king of a Middle Eastern nation plots to increase his own power by having the head of security at their American embassy killed and placing the blame on a group of dissidents. Columbo is assigned to crack the case, but the suspect's diplomatic immunity hinders the progress of the investigation. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Hector Elizondo and Sal Mineo

programme.title: Columbo: Death Lends a Hand (1971)
programme.desc: The crumpled cop investigates when a private eye murders his client's adulterous wife because she refuses to submit to his blackmail threats, and arranges the crime scene to make it look as if she was the victim of a mugging gone wrong. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ray Milland and Robert Culp

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is found raped and murdered in Central Park - and as her work involved contacting sexual partners of HIV patients, the detectives soon have a long list of suspects. The discovery of a second body raises fears that they are dealing with a serial killer - and the trail leads to a man who has no knowledge of the crimes, but is distantly connected to the first victim and her husband

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape investigation leads the team to a father and son who are being closely guarded under the witness protection programme so they can testify against Russian mobsters. To complicate matters, the victim is arrested on racketeering charges before it is possible to question her in detail. Pam Grier guest stars alongside Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a badly beaten youth is found in the luggage compartment on an airport shuttle bus, leading investigators to make further grisly discoveries as a paedophile ring is exposed. Subsequent inquiries lead them to a travel agency specialising in exotic trips for sexual predators. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are faced with the gruesome task of identifying an animal rights activist found decapitated in a park during a romantic rendezvous. The team try to find two potential killers who were in the vicinity - but are later stunned to discover the crime scene was staged to mislead investigators. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the rape of a cellist, and initially believe her conductor is to blame for the attack - especially given his penchant for erotic film-making. However, they soon discover an obsessive stalker is watching her from afar - and will stop at nothing to continue his monitoring. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Dr Huang try to prove a convicted serial killer is responsible for the rape and murder of another woman, whose assailant was never identified. In doing so, they hope to give the victim's parents a sense of closure - but face a race against time as the man is due to be executed in three days. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, BD Wong and Mariska Hargitay

programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder on a video chat website, and the team races to the victim's apartment, where a search reveals a significant clue - her laptop has gone missing. Inquiries eventually lead to a college professor who implicates the dead girl's boyfriend - and as the case unfolds, it emerges that the killer is lining up a second victim. Crime drama, starring AJ Buckley, Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Armed robbers break into the apartment of lawyer Roland Carson and make off in a helicopter with jewels worth more than $5million. The detectives investigate and, as people who have come into contact with the gems start to turn up dead, they suspect Carson could have staged the whole affair and killed his accomplices to cover his tracks. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple whose student son has been missing for a week fear the worst when they discover a badly decomposed body on the roof of a downtown warehouse, and the CSIs are called to investigate further. However, the case is turned on its head when the autopsy reveals the dead man's true identity, and an anonymous phone call leads the team on a wild chase through the city. Crime drama, guest starring Helen Slater

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the abduction and murder of a teacher, and later discover it's possible that she knew the culprit. Having arrested one of her students, the courts quickly decide their evidence is inadmissible - but it seems another assailant could be to blame. Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cyrus Lupo returns to New York after four years abroad. He and Green investigate two suicides that seem to be linked, and the detectives become suspicious of a parolee known as Dr Death. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green embark on their first official case together, investigating the kidnapping of a mother and daughter which occurred during a city-wide blackout. When it appears the abductor knew about the power cut in advance, the possibility of the manipulation of energy is called into question

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In an effort to find the terrorist Parsa, Gibbs and the NCIS team track down one of his cohorts using evidence gleaned from the drone attack which has killed six people and wounded a further 22. Meanwhile, an emotionally shaken McGee struggles with the ramifications of the incident. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, Sean Murray, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is buried alive, but manages to claw her way out of the grave. The only thing she remembers is that someone has planted a bomb on board a Navy ship - but in the process of trying to learn her identity, the team discovers things are not as they seem. Sherilyn Fenn (Twin Peaks) guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A spy satellite technician's voyeuristic activities inadvertently lead to him witnessing the murder of a Navy commander involved in an important weapons project. Tipped off by an anonymous call, the investigators arrive at the base to find the victim has been stabbed in the back. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A severed leg bearing a marine tattoo is discovered in a rubbish bin. Once the victim is identified, Gibbs and the crew follow the trail back to a small town, where an insurance fraud seems to have taken place. American naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The decomposing body of a five-year-old girl is found, leading to the revelation that a homicidal paedophile is on the loose. The subsequent disappearance of a second youngster leads to a race against time to save her from a similar fate. Gritty drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape of a woman in a coma leads the team to question a doctor whose stem cell research is funded by a billionaire with Parkinson's disease. They discover the tycoon is working in tandem with the medic to find a cure, but the pair's unethical procedures eventually come under scrutiny in court. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler's wife tells him about a teenage rape victim at the local hospital who is too frightened to go to the police. While trying to find out the girl's identity, he uncovers drug and alcohol abuse at the local school that has him fearing for his daughter's safety - and afraid he may jeopardise his spouse's job. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The stepdaughter of a judge known for his harsh sentencing of sex offenders is raped and murdered. Stabler and Benson's investigations reveal the rebellious girl had been involved with defendants in her stepfather's cases - and a revelation from her childhood leads the detectives to point the finger of suspicion at the victim's nearest and dearest. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman is murdered while taking the guise of an FBI agent during a role-playing game, and her fellow participant, the son of a hedge fund billionaire, is kidnapped and held to ransom. His father explains the pair were estranged and he refuses to pay the abductors, and a bungled sting coupled with a lack of information about those responsible means Mac must turn to the forensic evidence to bring the man back alive. Crime drama, guest starring Megan Dodds (Not Going Out)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A crime-scene lab technician is murdered in a manner remarkably similar to how one of her predecessors died in 1957, and someone anonymously texts pictures of the victim to Mac and Jo. The investigators discover the woman had been out drinking with two colleagues on the night of her death and receive some help from the retired detective who investigated the original case. Guest starring Lee Majors (The Six Million Dollar Man) and Spencer Grammer (Greek)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Columbo Likes the Nightlife (2003)
programme.desc: The disheveled cop is drawn into the world of the Los Angeles club scene when he investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter, and uncovers evidence of a blackmail plot. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Matthew Rhys and Jennifer Sky

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sniper begins a campaign of apparent random shootings in the city. The team knows that the killings are connected and identifies the criminal as a missing man who was subjected to abuse as a child, but Chief Carver refuses to make the information public, clashing with Mac in the process. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mac continues the investigation into the killing of Carver's sister and discovers a bullet lodged in the corpse's chest that matches a gun registered to the chief. However, Jo warns him of the consequences of accusing a senior officer of murder. Starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo discover the body of a department store manager in a shop window when they apprehend a pickpocket. They suspect the thief of murder, but his excuse leads them to the victim's assistant, who appears to have planned the crime. However, they unearth evidence that her dead boss had been accused of sexual harassment and had wounds on his body indicating that he might also have been an assailant. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in a lift, and McCoy finds his prosecution of the prime suspect hampered by a vindictive judge Ross offended in court

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant security guard is injured when a package explodes at a scientific research lab, prompting Green and Lupo to investigate a chemist's latest experiments. It transpires that research is being undertaken to establish whether it is possible to isolate the 'gay gene' in unborn foetuses. Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A dispute over a pair of trousers missing from a dry cleaner's ends in murder - and the ensuing investigation leads Lupo and Green to a businessman working for a shady multinational chain of department stores. Drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A spy satellite technician's voyeuristic activities inadvertently lead to him witnessing the murder of a Navy commander involved in an important weapons project. programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A severed leg bearing a marine tattoo is discovered in a rubbish bin. Once the victim is identified, Gibbs and the crew follow the trail back to a small town, where an insurance fraud seems to have taken place. American naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team races to find a sniper who is targeting marine recruitment officers and picking them off one by one. The only clue is a white feather left at the scene of each shooting - and in the absence of any other evidence, Gibbs uses himself as bait to catch the killer. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Sasha Alexander and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Three similar execution-style killings take place, and the team discovers one of the victims was going through a messy divorce. His widow falls under suspicion of committing the first two crimes to mask the murder of her husband - but, unfortunately for the agents, she has an alibi. Starring Michael Weatherly and David McCallum

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Part two of two. Goren comes under intense pressure when he battles his old enemy Elizabeth Hitchens, who embarks on a bloody campaign to discredit the detective and break his spirit. The struggle with his bitterest enemy will threaten his very survival. Olivia D'Abo guest stars, with Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives arrest two students suspected of raping and murdering a cancer patient who grew marijuana in her apartment. The pair blame each other, so the prosecution team is faced with the dilemma of charging the older boy as an adult, despite evidence that he was not mentally capable of carrying out the crimes. Christopher Meloni stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A 14-year-old rape victim tries to commit suicide by jumping off an underground platform. As Benson and Stabler search for her attacker, DNA tests unearth a dark family secret involving the two main suspects and the victim's parents. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cabot takes a child abuse case, determined to find evidence that will convict the defendant. Her personal feelings tempt her to bend the rules, leading Stabler and Benson into an illegal search of the victim's home - a move that threatens all of their careers

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives Benson and Stabler check the handbag of a suspected rape victim for identification and discover the severed finger of a small child in a plastic bag. programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Mad Max meets his new housemates, and chimps Ben and Pip get a shock when they have another encounter with alpha-male Hananya. Piquita is the centre of attention in the woolly monkey enclosure, while Bart enjoys honey for the first time in Paddy's chimp group

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The female capuchins fight, Tia needs surgery, and orangutan Amy enters the late stages of pregnancy. Elsewhere, there is a new addition to the play area in the chimp nursery, and Alison visits Paulo - the baby woolly monkey she has successfully hand-reared - for the final time

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.desc: An orphan facing the propspect of life on the street receives a visit from a guardian angel, who comforts her with the story of another child's search for a family and the role another mysterious helper played in her life. Children's fantasy, starring Angela Lansbury and Dick Van Dyke

programme.title: Hell is Sold Out (1951)
programme.desc: An author long assumed dead makes a surprise return, only to find books he did not write are being published under his name. He discovers that another writer, claiming to be his widow, is passing off her own creations as his previously unseen work to get them published. Drama, starring Mai Zetterling, Herbert Lom and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Angels One Five (1953)
programme.desc: A new recruit joins a squadron of British fighter pilots in the summer of 1940, as they prepare to face a confrontation with the overwhelming forces of the Luftwaffe over the English Channel, while the ground crew at their base anxiously awaits reports from the conflict. Second World War adventure, starring Jack Hawkins and John Gregson

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread (1991)
programme.desc: A wealthy widow travels to Italy to escape the pressure of her in-laws, and promptly falls in love with a poor local. When the revived woman agrees to marry her foreign friend, her relatives back home are shocked by the apparent disregard for class, culture and their family's image, and set about putting an end to the unlikely union. Period drama, based on the novel by EM Forster, starring Helena Bonham Carter, Judy Davis and Rupert Graves

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: Author and entrepreneur Michael Hayman interviews the business leaders at the heart of London's most exciting success stories

programme.title: Obsessed with My Body
programme.desc: With British boys now apparently spending 30 per cent more time in the bathroom than teenage girls and taking twice as many selfies, this documentary follows some of those in search of the perfect body. From bodybuilding and eyebrow waxing to make-up, the film also examines how far they will they go to achieve perfection. And what happens when things are taken to extremes?

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash employs some new technology that does not work. A new recruit gets some training, and a magazine article causes tension amid the team's superior officers

programme.title: Wildlife

programme.title: A London Community in Lockdown
programme.desc: A heartfelt look at life during lockdown in the Listraban community in London, a record of a moment in time that will be in the history books for generations to come

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Record producer Sam Phillips recalls how he discovered Elvis Presley. Landmark series from the 1970s, recounting the birth of rock 'n' roll

programme.title: Away (2016)
programme.desc: In Blackpool, an unlikely friendship blossoms between a lonely, suicidal widower and a young woman trying to escape an abusive ex-boyfriend. Drama, starring Timothy Spall, Juno Temple and Matt Ryan

programme.title: Dead Ringers (1988)
programme.desc: Identical twin gynaecologists Elliot and Beverly share everything in their life. Elliot, self-assured and experienced, passes his unwitting sexual conquests to shy and sensitive Beverly when he tires of them. However, when Beverly falls in love for the first time with a patient, the affair drives the brothers apart - and both men begin to lose their grip on their sanity. David Cronenberg's psychological thriller, with Jeremy Irons in a dual role alongside Genevieve Bujold

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Pretentious Alan, violent Kix and sex-mad Eleanor are part of a 1960s group of poets, artists and angry young men who convene for a weekend of amusement at a large villa overlooking the sea. Comedy, starring Peter Richardson, Adrian Edmondson, Dawn French, Jennifer Saunders and Rik Mayall

programme.desc: Patients with a wide range of ailments are invited to attend the Food Hospital, where consultant surgeon Shaw Somers, dietitian Lucy Jones and GP Giovanni Miletto are among specialists aiming to discover if tailored nutritional programmes can help. Among those in need of assistance are a 24-year-old woman suffering from polycystic ovary syndrome, and a 44-year-old single father battling type 2 diabetes. Pixie McKenna also investigates the truth about superfoods and the programme features an experiment to see if chocolate can help combat high blood pressure

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Diana tries to teach her grandchildren a lesson in money management, but Jimmy ruins the attempt by slipping the kids a few quid on the sly. She argues the case for deferred gratification as a character builder, so he retaliates by going out and buying her the laptop she has been after

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Luke Donald shares his memories of the remarkable 2012 Ryder Cup in Medinah, where the European team made a staggering comeback to win on the final day. The Americans went into the final day with a 10-6 lead, needing just 4.5 points from the 12 singles matches to win, but the Europeans won eight and tied one of the 12 singles matches to claim a famous 14.5-13.5 victory

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of Denver Broncos' 1998 Super Bowl success over Atlanta Falcons at the Pro Player Stadium in Miami, Florida. Quarterback John Elway became the oldest player to be named Super Bowl MVP, as he led the Broncos to a 34-19 victory in the final game of his career

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at Washington Redskins' 1991 Super Bowl victory over Buffalo Bills at the Metrodome in Minneapolis, Minnesota. The Redskins became only the fourth team to win three Super Bowls, while the Bills' loss meant they were now the third team to lose the showpiece encounter twice in succession
